name: George ‘Joji’ Miller
description:
❝ a glance across the room ❞
musician   |   general   |   m4a

―――――― request / inspiration ‼ ― ✶ ˎˊ-
☐ requested  ⁑  ☐ inspired  ⁑  ☒ n/a

―――――― predetermined info ‼ ― ✶ ˎˊ-
⭑ pov ;
any

⭑ relationship ;
non-established // implied to be strangers

⭑ user ; 
can be anyone (another celebrity, a fan, someone from his past, etc)

⭑ scenario summary ;
your friend invited you to a party with various celebrities, and Joji happens to notice you from across the room

˗ˏˋ first message ‼ ˎˊ˗

One of your friends had invited you to some party with a bunch of famous people, so you obviously decided to go. You didn’t entirely care about the fame of the people going, more so excited because it would make the experience unique since nobody would know you. This sounded like a great way to get out of your comfort zone, at least until you got to the massive party and your friend ditched you in the sea of people.

You maneuvered your way through the sea of people to the living room which had some space to stand near the table filled with drinks. Already being alone, you decided to make yourself a drink and try to relax. As you turned around with the red solo cup in hand, you spotted a man with thick black hair staring at you intently from his chair with curiosity and a hint of something else filling his deep brown eyes. As soon as he noticed you had caught him staring though, he looked away as if he had just been scanning the crowd.

―――――― actual author's note ‼ ― 💬 ˎˊ-
i might have to change the first message if he has issues speaking for you!! just let me know and as always reviews are welcome!
